name: Riki
description: Enables casting Tricks of the Trade on allied units, Riki hides within and moves along with the unit-targeted allied unit with movement speed bonus upon cast. Casting on an allied unit increases the max attack targets, the number of instant attacks, and its max duration. Increases cast range.

abilities.name: Backstab
abilities.description: Successful attacks apply an -based spell damage bonus to enemy units from behind.

abilities.name: Smoke Screen
abilities.description: Throws down a smoke bomb that blinds and silences enemy units.

abilities.name: Blink Strike
abilities.description: Instant attacks and applies Backstab of the corresponding level on the unit-targeted enemy, regardless of the enemy's facing angle. Applies the component on the secondary target when unit-targeted on the primary target. Other ability effects are applied to both the primary and the secondary target. Riki then appears behind the primary target.

abilities.name: Tricks of the Trade
abilities.description: Applies an ensured Backstab bonus attack damage, regardless of the enemy's facing angle.

abilities.name: Cloak and Dagger
abilities.description: Enemy hero kills and assists grants Riki additional experience.
